allow: PowerShell(winget install MongoDB.Server --location "D:\\MongoDB" --silent --accept-package-agreements)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); where.exe mongod 2>$null; if \($?\) { Write-Host "Found mongod in PATH" }; Get-ChildItem "D:\\MongoDB" -Recurse -Filter "mongod.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB" -Recurse -Filter "mongod.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
Read(//c/Program Files/MongoDB/**)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\bin;" + $env:Path; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\bin\\mongod.exe" -ArgumentList "--dbpath","D:\\mongodb-data" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "MongoDB starting..."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; & "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\bin\\mongosh.exe" --eval "db.version\(\)" --quiet 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "MongoDB is running!" } else { Write-Host "MongoDB might still be starting, checking port..."; netstat -an | Select-String "27017" })
